structural_note: Header (## PIVOT vNN), '---' delimiters, 2-4 sentence reframe; imperative/second-person voice ('Notice...', 'Try...').
Header (## PERMISSION vNN), '---' delimiters, short permission-giving statement, second person.
Header (## THREAD vNN), '---' delimiters, connective narrative bridging paragraph.
Header (## TAKEAWAY vNN), '---' delimiters, compressed summary statement, often aphoristic — must stay short and memorable in translation, not expand.

Header block (## STORY vNN) + optional frontmatter (MECHANISM_DEPTH, IDENTITY_STAGE, COST_TYPE, COST_INTENSITY, STORY_TYPE, STORY_TYPE_SOURCE) + '---' delimited body paragraph. Preserve all frontmatter keys verbatim (never translate).
Header (## INTEGRATION vNN), '---' delimiters, forward-looking application/practice statement.
Header (## HOOK vNN), '---' delimiters, 1-2 short paragraphs, often with a compressed one-line restatement after the first paragraph.
Header (## REFLECTION vNN), '---' delimiters, reflective question(s) or prompt in second person.

Header (## <SHAPE> vNN), '---' delimiters, optional key:value frontmatter block, body paragraph(s) in second person or character-study prose. Preserve header line and all frontmatter keys/values verbatim; only the body is translated.
Same story-atom frontmatter contract; short paragraph naming the comparison/anxiety state.

Header (## <SHAPE> vNN), '---' delimiters, optional key:value frontmatter block, body paragraph(s) in second person or character-study prose. Preserve header line and all frontmatter keys/values verbatim; only the body is translated.

Header (## <SHAPE> vNN), '---' delimiters, optional key:value frontmatter block, body paragraph(s) in second person or character-study prose. Preserve header line and all frontmatter keys/values verbatim; only the body is translated.
Same story-atom frontmatter contract as watcher/spiral; short paragraph naming the overwhelm state.

Header (## EXERCISE vNN), '---' delimiters, imperative step-by-step body in second person; body includes an explicit spoken line in quotes that must be preserved as a quotable, natural sentence in the target language.
Same story-atom frontmatter contract; short paragraph naming the shame state.
Same story-atom frontmatter contract; short paragraph naming the spiral/escalation state.

Header (## RECOGNITION vNN or bare), path/BAND/MECHANISM_DEPTH/COST_TYPE/COST_INTENSITY/IDENTITY_STAGE frontmatter, short recognition-of-pattern paragraph. Some files show header/body misalignment (see duplicate_clusters.json note) — verify header-to-body count parity before translating.
Header (## SCENE vNN), '---' delimiters, single scene paragraph, frequently contains {placeholder} tokens ({weather_detail}, {street_name}, {transit_line}) that must be preserved exactly, unexpanded.

Header (## <SHAPE> vNN), '---' delimiters, optional key:value frontmatter block, body paragraph(s) in second person or character-study prose. Preserve header line and all frontmatter keys/values verbatim; only the body is translated.

Header (## <SHAPE> vNN), '---' delimiters, optional key:value frontmatter block, body paragraph(s) in second person or character-study prose. Preserve header line and all frontmatter keys/values verbatim; only the body is translated.
